title: Property Consultant - Jones Lang LaSalle - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Jones Lang LaSalle - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
